title: Crepidium leucodon
taxonomy: Crepidium leucodon is classified under the kingdom Plantae, specifically within the family Orchidaceae, which is the largest and most diverse family of flowering plants. This epiphytic orchid belongs to the genus Crepidium, and more specifically, it is a species of the subtribe Spiranthinae. The classification of Crepidium leucodon is as follows: kingdom Plantae, family Orchidaceae, genus Crepidium, subtribe Spiranthinae, and species C. leucodon. At the species level, Crepidium leucodon is further classified into several infra-specific categories, such as varieties and subspecies. However, the exact classification and infra-specific categorization of Crepidium leucodon may vary depending on the source and taxonomic authority.
